Nexus Gateway Documentation
===========================

Welcome to the official documentation for **Nexus Gateway** — a lightweight, 
developer-first API gateway for managing authentication, rate limiting, and 
traffic routing across microservices.

This documentation covers core concepts, configuration guides, and integration 
patterns for teams building on the Nexus Gateway platform.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Concepts

   concepts/what-is-nexus-gateway
   concepts/authentication
   concepts/rate-limiting
   concepts/routing

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Guides

   guides/getting-started
   guides/configuring-routes
